text: Article 14 in Constitution of India. Equality before law. The State shall not deny to any person equality before the law or the equal protection of the laws within the territory of India.
title: Article 14: Equality before law

text: Article 21 in Constitution of India. Protection of life and personal liberty. No person shall be deprived of his life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law.
title: Article 21: Protection of life and personal liberty

text: Section 45 in The Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002. Offences to be cognizable and non-bailable. Bail is subject to statutory conditions requiring the court to be satisfied that there are reasonable grounds for believing the accused is not guilty and is not likely to commit an offence while on bail.
title: Section 45 PMLA: Offences to be cognizable and non-bailable
